mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (id, email, password_hash, full_name, username, avatar_url, provider, provider_id, default_currency, default_travel_mode, location_tracking, auto_checkin_radius, budget_alert_threshold, budget_alert_daily, default_trip_visibility, language, theme, onboarding_completed, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{fullName}, #{username}, #{avatarUrl}, #{provider}, #{providerId}, #{defaultCurrency}, #{defaultTravelMode}, #{locationTracking}, #{autoCheckinRadius}, #{budgetAlertThreshold}, #{budgetAlertDaily}, #{defaultTripVisibility}, #{language}, #{theme}, #{onboardingCompleted}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM users WHERE provider_id = #{providerId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET email = #{email}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, full_name = #{fullName}, username = #{username}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, default_currency = #{defaultCurrency}, default_travel_mode = #{defaultTravelMode}, location_tracking = #{locationTracking}, auto_checkin_radius = #{autoCheckinRadius}, budget_alert_threshold = #{budgetAlertThreshold}, budget_alert_daily = #{budgetAlertDaily}, language = #{language}, theme = #{theme}, onboarding_completed = #{onboardingCompleted}, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND deleted_at IS NULL
